# @sirrlock/openclaw-skill — Sirr OpenClaw Skill

OpenClaw workspace skill for the Sirr ephemeral secret vault.
Wraps the full Sirr REST API (24 operations) as callable functions,
triggered by natural language keywords.

## Install

Add to OpenClaw workspace — configure SIRR_SERVER, SIRR_TOKEN, and optionally SIRR_ORG
in the skill config.

## Operations

Secrets: getSecret, pushSecret, listSecrets, patchSecret, deleteSecret, pruneSecrets
Audit: queryAudit
Webhooks: createWebhook, listWebhooks, deleteWebhook
Keys: createKey, deleteKey
Me: getMe, patchMe
Orgs: createOrg, listOrgs, deleteOrg
Principals: createPrincipal, listPrincipals, deletePrincipal
Roles: createRole, listRoles, deleteRole
Server: healthCheck

## Org Mode

When config.org is set, all secret/audit/webhook/prune operations are automatically
routed to /orgs/{org_id}/... equivalents.

## Source

github.com/sirrlock/openclaw
